overall.description: A cinematic first-person walkthrough of a dystopian futuristic city (Cyberpunk 2077), beginning at an abandoned church under a highway overpass and progressing through neon-lit underpasses, past a striking pyramid structure, through urban plazas, and concluding along an elevated palm-lined walkway overlooking a massive circular stadium.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned church area beneath highway overpass

events.description: moving deeper under the concrete overpass structure, transitioning from open to enclosed space

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward through the debris-strewn area toward the church with the neon cross

entered.detail: triangular church facade with large glowing green neon cross
massive concrete highway overpass with thick support pillars
vertical red neon signage mounted on industrial building wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dystopian church with a prominent green neon cross, situated under a massive concrete highway overpass. The camera walks forward through debris and rubble, moving deeper into the shadowy underpass area.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark underpass with illuminated wall panels and tropical vegetation

events.description: entering the darker underpass area beneath the highway with artificial lighting becoming dominant
passing the striped illuminated wall on the right, casting bright horizontal light patterns

agents.ego_description: moving through the shadowy underpass beneath the highway structure, passing palm trees and rubble

entered.detail: wall with horizontal glowing yellow-white neon stripes
tropical palm trees growing in the underpass shadows
scattered concrete rubble and trash accumulated on the ground

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a dark, enclosed underpass beneath the highway, illuminated by a distinctive striped neon wall on the right. Palm trees and debris line the path as the scene transitions from the church area to a more industrial underground space.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with pyramid structure and abandoned vehicles

events.description: exiting the dark underpass into the open plaza with the large pyramid structure visible
approaching the pyramid structure with purple glass panels and neon green edges

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza area with abandoned vehicles and construction debris scattered around

notable_agents.action: person standing near debris pile on the right side of the path

entered.detail: large triangular building with purple glass panels and neon green structural framework
building facade with HOTEL CASINO signage visible
derelict cars and orange construction equipment left in the plaza
large wall covered in colorful murals and street art

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass, the scene opens into a wide plaza dominated by a striking pyramid structure with purple glass and neon green edges. Abandoned vehicles and debris litter the ground while a hotel sign rises in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath the pyramid structure

events.description: entering the covered area beneath the pyramid structure
slight turn to the right while navigating under the pyramid

agents.ego_description: walking under the pyramid structure, passing NPCs standing by the railing and approaching the WATSON building

notable_agents.action: person in yellow pants leaning against the concrete railing
person walking ahead in the distance toward the plaza

entered.detail: massive futuristic skyscraper with WATSON signage at the top and glass facade
small red booth structure with orange roof in the plaza

segments.scene_description: The camera moves beneath the pyramid structure into a covered walkway with tiled flooring. The massive WATSON building becomes visible ahead while NPCs stand by the railings, and a small red kiosk sits in the plaza area.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark tunnel entrance at the base of the skyscraper

events.description: entering the dark tunnel or corridor at the base of the WATSON building
emerging from the dark tunnel back into natural daylight

agents.ego_description: entering the dark tunnel entrance at the base of the WATSON building and proceeding through to the other side

entered.detail: dark passageway entrance with heavy concrete architecture and metal gates

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a dark, enclosed tunnel at the base of the WATSON building, transitioning from the open plaza to a narrow corridor. After passing through the dimly lit passage, it emerges back into daylight.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated palm-lined walkway with city overlook

events.description: exiting the tunnel onto an elevated walkway with palm trees and open sky
approaching the overlook with view of the massive circular stadium structure in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated pathway lined with palm trees, overlooking the cityscape and the circular building ahead

notable_agents.action: person leaning on the railing looking out at the view

entered.detail: massive circular building with stadium-like architecture and tiered levels
tall tropical palm trees lining both sides of the walkway
concrete safety barrier along the edge of the elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals an elevated walkway bathed in natural morning light, lined with palm trees and overlooking a vast cityscape. The camera approaches a massive circular stadium structure in the distance while passing an NPC leaning on the railing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shadowy, dystopian underpass into a bright, elevated urban vista. It begins at a church marked by a green neon cross beneath a concrete highway overpass, moving through rubble and into a dark tunnel illuminated by a striped neon wall. As the camera emerges from the enclosure, the scene opens into a wide plaza dominated by a purple glass pyramid with neon green edges and scattered abandoned vehicles. The movement then carries the viewer beneath the pyramid and through a narrow, dimly lit corridor at the base of the WATSON building before finally breaking back into the daylight. The shot concludes on an elevated, palm-lined walkway bathed in morning light, overlooking a vast cityscape and a massive circular stadium in the distance.
